competitors.name: Urban Company
competitors.notes: India's largest home services marketplace offering cleaning, appliance repair, beauty, wellness, and home maintenance services. Primary benchmark competitor for pricing, service portfolio, and customer experience.

competitors.name: NoBroker Home Services
competitors.notes: Home services division of NoBroker offering cleaning, painting, pest control, AC servicing, appliance repair, and relocation services. Strong competitor due to its existing customer ecosystem.

competitors.name: Pronto
competitors.notes: Emerging hyperlocal home services startup focused on fast booking and fulfillment. Important competitor for monitoring rapid growth, pricing strategy, and operational model.

competitors.name: Snabbit
competitors.notes: Fast-growing startup providing on-demand household help and cleaning services with a quick-response model. Valuable competitor for tracking innovation, customer acquisition, and service expansion.
